On acquisition announcement, target spikes to ~90% of deal price, leaving a 5–10% spread. The spread reflects deal-close probability. Wider spread = higher regulatory risk.
Insiders locked out 180 days from IPO. Expiry floods market with supply. Stock historically drops 5–15% in the two weeks surrounding expiry.

Buybacks >5% of float generate average +12% over 12 months vs market. Signals management confidence. Reduces share count = EPS accretion.

outside_opps.exit_trigger: Launch day OR pre-orders miss expectations
